purpose: Promote the first live SHT45 + AS7263 skylight/air-dry bench session from ignored monitor logs into tracked, computable evidence.
honest_gap_policy: Logger gaps and no-exact-time operator events are surfaced in indexes; do not interpolate sun/shade boundaries that were not timestamped.

bench_conditions.soil_probe_state: air-dry on bench, exposed to same skylight path
bench_conditions.soil_probe_orientation: s2/s3 silkscreen up; s1/s4 silkscreen down

key_observations: SHT45 ambient_temp rose from about 28 C baseline to mid-30s C in direct sun.
AS7263 nir_680 and nir_860 frequently hit raw 51201 during direct sun.
After shade, soil probes returned to a tight air-dry cluster near 3130-3200 raw.
Low soil raw outliers occur during handling/repositioning and are not moisture.
pii_posture: Generated files use relative source paths, device telemetry, local timestamps, probe IDs, raw counts, calibrated SHT45 values, and bench notes. No home coordinates or personal identifiers are intentionally included.
